stories.title: LeBron James Decision Day — Announcement Expected Today

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Pat Beverley this morning:

"Rumor has it Bron makes his decision today."

The NBA hasn't released its schedule. The league is holding its breath.

Heat. Cavs. Warriors. 76ers. One answer changes everything.

#LeBronJames #NBAFreeAgency

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Warriors got "good news" on LeBron from an NBA head coach.
Heat reportedly got "bad news."
Shams says he's "getting closer and closer."

Betting odds right now:
→ Heat: 35%
→ Cavs: 29%
→ Warriors: 17%
→ 76ers: 14%

It's happening.

#LeBronJames #NBAFreeAgency

article.headline: LeBron James Decision Expected Monday: Warriors Got Good News, Heat Got Bad News

stories.title: Lendeborg Makes History — Second Player Ever to Win NCAA + NBA Summer League Same Year

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Yaxel Lendeborg just became only the 2nd player in history to win an NCAA title AND an NBA Summer League championship in the same year.

The first was Davion Mitchell in 2021.

The Warriors' No. 11 pick isn't just good. He's historically good.

#Warriors #SummerLeague

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Lendeborg in the 2026 Summer League Championship:

21 pts. 10 reb. 2 stl. 23 minutes.
Warriors were down 12 in the 4th.
He willed them back.

First Warriors SL title since 2013.

History was made Sunday night.

#Warriors #SummerLeague

article.headline: Lendeborg Makes History: Only Second Player Ever to Win NCAA Title and Summer League Championship in Same Year

stories.title: Kawhi Leonard Investigation — Still Weeks Away, Silver Pressure Mounts

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The Kawhi Leonard investigation is STILL going.

10+ months. Two endorsement deals now under scrutiny. Personal expenses flagged.

Silver says it MUST end before the season.

Raptors still can't plan their roster.

When does this end?

#NBA #Raptors

article.headline: Kawhi Leonard Investigation Drags Into Month 11 With No End in Sight — Silver Demands Resolution

stories.title: Victor Wembanyama Signs $252M Extension — Spurs Lock In Their Franchise

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Victor Wembanyama. 5 years. $252 million. Staying in San Antonio.

He left $50 million on the table to stay with the Spurs.

The best young player in basketball is locked in. The rebuild is real.

#Spurs #NBAFreeAgency

article.headline: Victor Wembanyama Signs 5-Year, $252 Million Extension — San Antonio's Generational Rebuild Has Its Anchor

stories.title: The New NBA Is Almost Complete — All Trades Official, Just Waiting on LeBron

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The 2026-27 NBA is almost complete:

→ Giannis → Miami
→ Jaylen Brown → Philly
→ Ja Morant → Portland
→ LaMelo Ball → Minnesota
→ Paul George → Boston
→ Wembanyama staying in San Antonio

One piece left: LeBron James.

#NBAFreeAgency
